objects.label: bed
objects.description: dark wood bed with striped bedding
objects.long_form_open_description: Close-up of a dark polished wooden bed with a paneled rectangular headboard, covered by beige-and-gray horizontal striped sheets and two matching pillows; the crop is edge-cropped showing the mattress top and part of the headboard in a near-camera view, estimated distance ~1.0 m.

objects.label: picture frame
objects.description: dark wood gold-trim picture frame edge-crop
objects.long_form_open_description: Narrow vertical dark-brown wooden picture frame with a gold inner trim and glass front, showing part of a framed artwork with a tall spire; the crop is edge-cut/partial (top and bottom likely outside view) with slight reflection on the glass; estimated distance from camera ~0.8 m.

objects.label: bed
objects.long_form_open_description: Neatly made bed with white and gray striped bedding on a dark wooden frame, headboard and footboard partially visible at left and right; pillow and bedside lamp visible indicating the bed is edge-cropped and partially shown — appears queen-sized and approximately 1.5 meters from the camera.
